_meta.description: Call-to-action templates by content type. Used by auto-remediate.py.

financial.default: **Ready to put these insights to work?** Subscribe to our newsletter for weekly market analysis, or book a free consultation to discuss your portfolio strategy.
financial.newsletter: **Found this useful?** Subscribe for weekly market analysis delivered straight to your inbox.
financial.consultation: **Want a second opinion on your portfolio?** Book a free 30-minute consultation with our team.
financial.download: **Get the full picture.** Download our free financial planning guide to build a strategy tailored to your goals.

investment.default: **Take the next step.** Download our free investment guide or schedule a call with a portfolio specialist to build a strategy tailored to your goals.
investment.newsletter: **Stay ahead of the market.** Subscribe for investment insights and analysis every week.
investment.consultation: **Ready to invest with conviction?** Schedule a call with an investment specialist today.
investment.download: **Get the full playbook.** Download our free investment framework used by over 10,000 investors.

general.default: **Want to learn more?** Contact us today or explore our resource library for additional insights.
general.newsletter: **Enjoyed this? Subscribe** for weekly insights delivered to your inbox.
general.community: **Join the conversation.** Share your thoughts in the comments or connect with us directly.
general.website: **Curious to see what we're building?** Visit our website to explore our full suite of tools and resources.

linkedin.default: What's your take? Drop a comment below — I read every one.
linkedin.engagement: Agree or disagree? I'd genuinely like to know.
linkedin.soft: If this resonated, share it with someone who needs to hear it.

twitter.default: Hot take? Pushback welcome. RT if this changed how you see it.
twitter.soft: Follow for more. No fluff, just signal.
